description_long: This is a compact, tracked military vehicle with a rounded turret mounted centrally on its hull. The vehicle features wide, continuous metal tracks on both sides, designed for traversing rough terrain, and a sloped front with a protruding section that may house a weapon or observation device. The hull is angular and armored, with visible rivets and panel lines, and the turret has a small hatch on top. The rear of the vehicle is slightly elevated, and the tracks wrap around large drive sprockets and idler wheels. The overall color is a dark, matte green, typical of early 20th-century armored vehicles, with no visible camouflage or markings. The vehicle appears to be an early tank, likely from the World War I era, with a utilitarian and robust design.
description: A compact, dark green tracked military vehicle with a rounded turret and wide metal tracks, featuring a sloped armored hull and no visible markings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the narrow, sloped armored hull, central turret, and wide metal tracks on both sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the continuous track system, rounded turret, and sloped front section.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the elevated back, track ends, and the angular hull shape.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the track system, turret, and sloped front.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One visible weapon mount on the front right side of the turret, likely for a machine gun or small cannon.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body armor plating is visible, with riveted steel panels covering the hull and turret. The armor appears moderately thick and is sloped at the front for deflection.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: None visible; the vehicle is painted in a solid dark green color.
